name: Russian Black Bread#1 (Breadabm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature and pour into the bakery.
2. Set "baking control" at 10 o'clock.
3. Select "white bread" and push Start.
4. In hot and humid weather, use 1/8 cup less water.
5. Tested in DAK R2D2.
Notes:
Eat this wonderful hearty bread with soup and/or salad or serve it as an appetizer with a crab dip. You may substitute dark molasses for the barley malt syrup.
